name: Tomato, Basil, and Mozzarella Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Tomatoes; large, red, very ripe (2-3 tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the tomatoes crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick slices, making about 4 slices per tomato.
2. Arrange the tomato slices on each salad plate, using 2-3 slices per serving.
3. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella over the top of each tomato slice.
4. Cut fresh basil leaves into strips and place them on top of each tomato.
5. Drizzle olive oil over the tomatoes and add a dash of cracked pepper.
6. Enjoy your salad!
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 MEDIUM-FAT-MEAT EXCHANGE.
CHO: 6; PRO: 5g; FAT: 4g; CAL: 70;
Low-sodium diets: This recipe is suitable.
